title: One to one communication
excerpt: hello, is there possible for users to communicate one to one on monday crm?

posts.author: lizi (lizi)
posts.cookedHtml: hello, is there possible for users to communicate one to one on monday crm?

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @lizi Hi! At the moment, Monday CRM doesn’t have a built-in private messaging or direct one-to-one chat feature like Slack or MS Teams.

However, you could:
Use the board updates / comments - I like using the Board discussion as keeps a track of items I have flagged / raised at a board level. However its all public to all board users!

image405×135 5.01 KB

image485×452 15.4 KB

  • Using private boards or WorkDoc items where only selected users can view and comment.
  • Integrating a third-party messaging app (like Slack or MS Teams) via Monday’s integrations if you need more direct communication.

It’s a bit more collaboration-focused rather than traditional private messaging, but hopefully that helps!

posts.author: Mindflows_Shanine (Shanine Velarde)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Lizi!

Shanine here from Mindflows. I understand that you are looking for a one-to-one communication on monday.com. As of now, that feature isn’t available yet. It’s a great idea though!

For communication, we usually use the Board Discussion, or simply communicate with a team member via the Updates section.

Hope it helps!

Best Regards,
Shanine

posts.author: kathrin (kathrin)
posts.cookedHtml: Monday CRM supports one-to-one communication through item updates and tags, but it doesn’t offer a dedicated real-time chat feature. If you need private messaging or chat-style communication, you may want to integrate a enterprise chat software like Mirrorfly
